tools.name: url_pulse
tools.description: Check a public HTTP or HTTPS URL before expensive browsing or AI processing. Returns availability, redirects, content type, page metadata, language, cache state, content hash, robots policy, and access restrictions. Does not execute JavaScript.

tools.name: url_passport
tools.description: Inspect a public HTTP or HTTPS URL and return a structured site passport. Includes pulse fields, registrable domain, robots and sitemap discovery, feeds, OpenAPI hints, and page metadata. Uses at most eight external HTTP requests and does not execute JavaScript.

tools.name: url_extract
tools.description: Extract normalized main text and optional links from a public HTTP or HTTPS document. Returns title, author, publication time, language, content hash, truncation and cache state. Output size and fetch time are bounded; JavaScript is not executed.

tools.name: url_changed
tools.description: Compare a public HTTP or HTTPS URL with its previously stored normalized content hash. Creates a baseline on first use, then reports whether content changed and returns current and previous hashes with timestamps. JavaScript is not executed.

tools.name: url_status
tools.description: Check HTTP reachability, status and final URL. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_redirects
tools.description: Return the safely validated redirect chain. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_headers
tools.description: Return allowlisted response headers only. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_timing
tools.description: Return measured end-to-end fetch timing. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_content_type
tools.description: Classify MIME type, charset and bounded content length. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_canonical
tools.description: Resolve requested, final and declared canonical URLs with evidence. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_language
tools.description: Report declared and heuristically detected document language. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_hash
tools.description: Compute a versioned SHA-256 of normalized content. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_metadata
tools.description: Extract title, description, author, dates and canonical metadata. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_social_cards
tools.description: Extract bounded Open Graph and Twitter Card fields. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_jsonld
tools.description: Extract bounded JSON-LD blocks without executing scripts. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_headings
tools.description: Return the bounded heading hierarchy from h1 through h6. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_word_stats
tools.description: Estimate words, characters, sentences and reading time. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_links
tools.description: Extract up to 200 normalized safe links. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_images
tools.description: List up to 100 image references without downloading images. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_text
tools.description: Return bounded normalized readable text. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_markdown
tools.description: Convert readable HTML content to bounded Markdown. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_rag_chunks
tools.description: Split readable text into deterministic bounded RAG chunks. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_diff
tools.description: Return a bounded normalized diff against the previous snapshot. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: site_robots
tools.description: Fetch and parse the origin robots.txt policy. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: site_sitemaps
tools.description: Discover up to five bounded sitemap resources. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: site_feeds
tools.description: Discover declared RSS and Atom feeds. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: site_llms_txt
tools.description: Return bounded llms.txt text when publicly available. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: site_security_txt
tools.description: Parse public security.txt fields without following contacts. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: site_openapi
tools.description: Discover and summarize bounded public OpenAPI documents. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_security_headers
tools.description: Assess common response security headers as static evidence. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_tls
tools.description: Inspect the public HTTPS certificate on port 443. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: url_access_flags
tools.description: Report heuristic authentication, paywall and JavaScript access flags. Use only for public HTTP(S) resources; it does not execute JavaScript or bypass access controls.

tools.name: catalog_search
tools.description: Search the local 1cent tool catalog without fetching a URL or requiring payment. Returns up to five matching tools with purpose, current atomic price and REST path.
